import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
from sklearn.datasets import load_iris
import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['font.family'] = 'Arial'

def task_func():
    iris = load_iris()
    df = pd.DataFrame(iris.data, columns=iris.feature_names)
    df['species'] = iris.target

    pair_plot_data = df.copy()
    sns_pair = sns.pairplot(data=pair_plot_data, hue='species')
    sns_pair.fig.suptitle('Iris Dataset Pair Plot')

    # Set axis labels
    axis_labels = ['sepal length (cm)', 'sepal width (cm)',
                   'petal length (cm)', 'petal width (cm)']
    for i, label in enumerate(axis_labels):
        sns_pair.axes[0, i].set_xlabel(label)
        sns_pair.axes[1, i].set_ylabel(label)

    pair_plot_fig = sns_pair.fig
    return tuple([pair_plot_fig, axis_labels])
